response.justification: The candidate is a strong generalist software engineer with deep expertise in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack systems, but the resume shows only a brief ~7-month stint writing C/C++ at National Instruments (2014-2015) and a bachelor thesis in C++ on Linux. The role demands 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus SQL Server/Oracle and fixed-income or capital-markets domain experience, none of which are demonstrated. RIDE Capital was a retail investment product, not capital markets or fixed income.
strengths: Senior engineer with 10+ years across diverse stacks and strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Excellent communication evidenced by workshops, conference talks, and training courses
Some exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments and a C++ audio synthesis thesis project
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ experience; C/C++ work was brief and over a decade ago
No demonstrated Windows-platform development; background is predominantly Linux and cloud
No fixed-income, derivatives, investment-banking, or SQL Server/Oracle experience

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and communication skills
